notes: Axis 1: High spend (revenue_pressure) but low motion (small, stable)
Axis 2: High motion (large, SaaS) but low spend (no pressure)
Axis 3: High firmographic fit but weak buying intent
Conflict: high motion/firmographic but weak spend
Test ceiling: high on all dimensions
Test floor: low on all dimensions
LinkedIn paradox: strong profile, weak company fundamentals
Inverse paradox: weak profile, strong company fundamentals
